reasoning_model_1: Model 1 generates the text '请您稍等，我马上回来帮您处理。' accurately (00:00-00:02). However, regarding the core requirement 'Medium Speaking Rate' (中速), the model performs poorly. model_comparison: Both models accurately reproduce the text content. The decisive difference lies in the 'Speaking Rate' (语速) dimension. The user requested a 'Medium' speed.
